title: Architectural points connected by straight lines

rule.instruction: All architectural points connected by straight lines.

restrictions: Faithful execution and a deliberate GENRE SHIFT (rounds 1-7 were all line-fills; per learnings, change the visual language). 'Architectural points' of the wall = its corners, edge midpoints, centre, or a regular/irregular set of marked points; ALL pairs are joined by straight lines -> a complete-graph web (new connectDots generator). Monochrome black on white. The 16 executions span distinct sub-ideas: the minimal corner web (square + diagonals), corners+midpoints(+centre), regular-polygon perimeter webs (string-art), grid meshes, and irregular random point-sets — a few rendered with a gentle hand-drawn line (jitter). Per learnings, denser webs are included since fine/dense has been preferred.
